contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Capoeira practice: final-move Next button now finishes the session
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira/pull/18
  
  Details:
  Fixed a UX dead-end on https://capoeira.agroverse.shop/practice.html: on the final move of a generated session, the "Next →" button was disabled and clicking it did nothing. There was no visible way to end the session — the user had to sit through the per-move timer + 30s rest period to reach the Session Complete card.
  
  Change: when currentMoveIndex is the last move, relabel "Next →" to "Finish Session →" and route the click straight to finishSession(). aria-label updates in lockstep for screen readers. Auto-flow path (timer + rest → finishSession via showRestPeriod) is unchanged.
  
  PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira/pull/18 (merged to main, squash, branch deleted).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00

- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
